top_signals.title: ECB’s Dolenc Sees No Urgency to Hike If Energy Markets Stay Calm
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank may be able to keep interest rates unchanged at its next meeting if the situation in the Middle East doesn’t escalate in the meantime, according to Governing Council member Primoz Dolenc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: AA shifts gears towards £5bn London listing
top_signals.summary: An IPO of UK roadside recovery business could pit it against rival flotation plans by RAC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Egg producers settle US claims they manipulated benchmark prices
top_signals.summary: Federal and state authorities cite three-year effort to co-ordinate bids that inflated quotations
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Britain’s defence investment predicament
top_signals.summary: After months of wrangling, Starmer’s military funding plan still came up short
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vedanta pulls listing of copper unit day before IPO
top_signals.summary: CopperTech Metals’ market entry was meant to take advantage of US enthusiasm for critical minerals
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Binance and founder sued by crypto investors in London lawsuit
top_signals.summary: Nearly 1,700 UK users allege that world’s largest crypto exchange offered risky products without regulatory approval
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Key Burnham adviser pushes back at union call for bank tax rise
top_signals.summary: Trades Union Congress estimates restoring previous surcharge could raise £9bn
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In a first, Trump will travel aboard Qatari-donated Air Force One
top_signals.summary: Trump will travel to North Dakota on Wednesday for the aircraft's inaugural presidential use over a week after its commissioning flights began.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
